scripts.install:all: cd api && npm install && cd ../app && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd api && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.build: concurrently "cd api && npm run start" "cd app && npm run build"
scripts.preview: concurrently --names "API,APP" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd api && npm run start" "cd app && npm run preview"
